scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter @smartkids/web run build && pnpm --filter @smartkids/api exec wrangler deploy
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter @smartkids/api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply smartkids --remote
scripts.db:seed:remote: pnpm --filter @smartkids/api exec wrangler d1 execute smartkids --remote --file=seed.sql
